subcodes.first_line: O esteemed offspring of that noble being, think not that for even a moment have I been forgetful of thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نجل محترم آن ذات مکرم همچو گمان منما که دقیقه ای از یادت فراغت حاصل و یا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @eulogies; reminiscences, @consolation and comfort
